artists.empty: No artists yet - the catalog may still be syncing.
artists.title: Artists

edit.dedupeLabel: De-duplicate - keep only the highest-quality copy when files land in the same place (otherwise they get (2), (3)… suffixes)

deleteConfirm.message: Remove this library? Your files stay on disk; it's removed from Chordia.
deleteConfirm.title: Remove library

edit.foldersHelp: Untick a folder to keep it out of this library. Unticking a folder disables everything inside it.

organizeConfirm.messageDedupe: This moves files on disk into the new layout and deletes lower-quality duplicates. Continue?
organizeConfirm.messagePlain: This moves files on disk into the new layout. Your audio isn't altered, only relocated. Continue?
organizeConfirm.title: Organize files

edit.organizeHelp: Lay this library's audio files out on disk from a template. Folders are created as needed and scanned automatically.
edit.pairedDeviceFolders: To edit folders, open this page on the device where you paired this server.
edit.pairedDeviceOrganize: To change this, open this page on the device where you paired this server.
edit.removeHelp: Removes it from Chordia. Your audio files are not touched.
edit.rescanHelp: Re-reads every file from disk (metadata, added/removed tracks).
edit.templateHelp: Variables: {vars}. Empty parts are skipped and the file extension is added automatically. Tracks with no album use the Singles template; files we can't identify (no artist tag) use the Unidentified one.
edit.title: Edit library

clearConfirm.message: Remove all downloaded songs from this device?
clearConfirm.title: Clear downloads

downloads.emptyState: Songs you download play without a connection. Use the Download action on any track to save it here.
downloads.title: Downloads

liked.empty: Songs you like will show up here. Tap the heart on any track.
liked.title: Liked Songs

empty.hint: Start your library server and pair it from the {settingsLink}.
empty.title: No libraries yet.

metadata.intro: Edit metadata for this library only. Your changes apply across your views; anything you leave blank keeps the original value. Global catalog edits live in the admin page.
metadata.title: Metadata

new.noServer: No paired server found on this device. Pair a library server from {settingsLink} first.
new.serverSelectHint: This new library will be created on the selected server.
new.title: New library

addLibraries.description: Browse the library server's filesystem to pick where your music lives. You can add more folders later from settings.
addLibraries.title: Add music folders

done.addLater: You can add music folders anytime from {settingsLink}.
done.foldersAdded: {count, plural, one {# folder added.} other {# folders added.}} Scanning is running in the background - tracks will appear shortly.
done.title: Library server connected!

setup.hubRejectedToken: The Hub rejected the session token. Try logging out and back in, then retry pairing.
setup.missingParams: Missing setup parameters. Please open the link printed in the library server terminal.

pair.description: This will link {url} to your Chordia account.
pair.title: Connect library server

setup.sessionExpired: Your session has expired - please log out and back in, then retry.

share.noFriends: You have no friends to share with yet.
share.title: Share "{name}"
